So there is always going to be a correlation between the spend and the results. And that's why people that work at a really, really high level, right?

## [57:26 - 1:00:29]

So a physical product company might make water bottles and they make water bottles and anybody can come by them and you start to sell those. There's a huge opportunity cost for you not to work in other places where you have skills, experience and knowledge. Be careful not to sign anything that says you won't work in that in the future. Right?
